texts.s:
STAIR NOTES (IRC R311.7):
MAX RISER 7-3/4" / MIN TREAD 10"
DESIGN RUN: 10-1/2"
RISER/TREAD VARIATION: 3/8" MAX
NOSING 3/4"-1-1/4" IF TREAD <11"
HANDRAIL REQ'D AT 4+ RISERS,
GRIP 1-1/4" TO 2" DIA.

2x6 PT W/ 1/2" DIA
EXPANSION BOLTS @ 16" OC

OPENINGS SHALL NOT PASS
A 4" SPHERE (IRC R312.1.3)
GUARD REQ'D WHERE WALKING SURFACE >30" ABOVE GRADE (IRC R312.1.1)
OPENINGS SHALL NOT PASS A 4" SPHERE (IRC R312.1.3)

Install per manufacturer specifications.
Verify all models with supplier before ordering.
All hardware HDG or stainless steel

annots.s:
(3) 6x6 PT POSTS
ON 36" PIERS x 36"
DEEP

texts.s: 2x10 PT LEDGER W/ (2) 5" LEDGER LOCKS @ 16" O.C.

STAIR NOTES:
HANDRAIL ON BOTH SIDES, 34" ABOVE NOSING
MAX RISER 7.75" / MIN TREAD 10"
NOSINGS .75" TO 1.25" W/ SOLID RISERS
MAX 3/8" VARIANCE IN ANY FLIGHT
